creator: iron.udjin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #26)

When my website has started experience problem with overload because of thousands distributed requests like "GET / HTTP/2.0", I switched website to cloudflare and configured filters which was allow the website stay alive. So, there wasn't any direct traffic from clients to the server. Regarding traffic pattern: all traffic was TCP/HTTPS/443 port from cloudflare. Currently there no DDoS attack and no crashes. I guess to make .pcap file now is useless.
